nasb.text: Out of all your gifts you shall present every offering due to the Lord, from all the best of them, the sacred part from them.’

esv.text: Out of all the gifts to you, you shall present every contribution due to the Lord; from each its best part is to be dedicated.’

cnv.text: 從你們得的一切禮物中，要把最好的，分別為聖，獻給耶和華為舉祭。

ccb.text: 你们要把所得之物中至圣至好的献给耶和华作举祭。
